body_txt: A character either witnessing a nauseating sight, or describing something nauseating, is completely unbothered by it. Bonus points if it makes another character nauseated. Frequently Played for Laughs . Often leads to a Vomit Discretion Shot or Vomit Indiscretion Shot . See also Autopsy Snack Time . Additionally, the Vomiting Cop is frequently found with a more jaded cop who isn't nauseous.
